name: Pasta with Mizithra
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil for cooking the pasta.
2. Prepare all other ingredients.
3. Never overcook the pasta; it should be just barely tender.
4. Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the pan with garlic and olive oil.
5. Toss the drained pasta with Parmesan, Mizithra cheese, salt, pepper, and parsley.
6. Serve as a side dish in place of another starch.
